summary: Plan-only inventory classification for 25 open pull requests. No shared canonical was selected and no GitHub mutations are recommended; every hydrated PR remains independent for normal maintainer triage.

actions.reason: This inventory shard has no canonical family; the PR should remain independently triaged by maintainers. No duplicate, supersession, low-signal closeout, merge, or fix action is supported by the job gates.
